faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Glen Oaks typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Glen Oaks residents dealing with hornet emergencies. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach nests may require additional time for safe elimination.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my Glen Oaks property?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets can be highly aggressive when defending their nests and deliver painful, potentially dangerous stings, especially to children, pets, or those with allergies. They often build nests in eaves, trees, and wall voids throughout Glen Oaks homes, posing risks to residents and visitors.

faqs.question: What's included in your Glen Oaks hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. We also provide follow-up support and warranty coverage to ensure your Glen Oaks property remains hornet-free.
